title: Score compounds using 275 frequent hitter rules published in the Lilly-Medchem-Rules
author: Davies, Julia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Robert Bruns and Ian Watson published 275 rules to identify frequent hitters based on 18-years of experiments at Eli-Lilly. This protocol requires the Lilly-Medchem-Rules to be installed on the server and accessible to Pipeline Pilot. 

 Reference:  Rules for Identifying Potentially Reactive or Promiscuous Compounds  

 GitHub Repository:  Lilly-Medchem-Rules  

 This protocol is being made available in conjunction with an upcoming publication.
steps_raw:
